name: Tapinarof
description: Tapinarof is targeted as a topical cream treatment for psoriasis, a chronic autoimmune skin disease.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in psoriasis and psoriatic disorders.
mechanismOfAction: WBI-1001 selectively modulates the cytokine cascade deep under the skin, a process that rapidly decreases inflammations and skin plague. It targets the four major mechanisms involved in the disease.
